/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/test_bluewire.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/vserial.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/heater_emu.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/bluwire_task.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/home/kboran/Nextcloud/development/dieselfire/DieselFire/src/Protocol/Protocol.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/home/kboran/Nextcloud/development/dieselfire/DieselFire/src/Utility/MODBUS-CRC16.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/mock/mock_globals.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/mock/mock_utilclasses.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/mock/mock_data.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/bluewire-test.dir/mock/mock_tempsense.cpp.o" -o bluewire-test  -lm -ldl -lpthread
